title: senecio gardneri
intro: Senecio gardneri, also known as the 'Prairie Smoke' or 'Gardner's Senecio', is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of California and Oregon in the United States. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio gardneri include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system, although it's essential to note that excessive consumption can be toxic. Herbal preparations of Senecio gardneri can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
